DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'S SECOND AND CONTINUED NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT OF RIGHTS, RESTRAINING ORDER, AND TURNOVER ORDER. CONTINUED TO AUGUST 30, 2018 @ 9 A.M. DISCOVERY. THE PAPERS FILED BY THE MOVING PARTY DO NOT SPECIFICALLY IDENTIFY THE SOURCES OF INCOME TO BE ATTACHED. THE INFORMATION REQUESTED SHALL CONFORM TO THAT ORDERED IN A SIMILAR PROCEEDING IN THIS COURT (SFSC NO. 548742 - BIRITE V. AGUILAR.) THE MOVING PARTY SHALL PROVIDE SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEFING WITH THIS INFORMATION BY AUGUST 23, 2018. ANY OPPOSITION SHALL BE FILED BY AUGUST 28, 2018. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS ADMONISHED THAT IF THIS IS INFORMATION IS NOT PROVIDED IN FUTURE MOTIONS, THE MOTIONS WILL BE DENIED RATHER THAN CONTINUED GIVEN THE REPEATED COURT ORDERS ON THIS ISSUE. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD; CLERK: WILLIAM TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
Third Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Jun-05-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ryan L. Dahm, esq. (415-989-4730) of Cook Collection Attorneys, PLC for Plaintiff.
No other appearances.

Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'s Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order:

The motion is GRANTED, no opposition filed. Moving party to submit a revised proposed order modifying the section entitled "Notice to Judgment Debtor" via email to noah@ndllegal.com

Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Second And Continued Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Aug-30-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ryan L. Dahm of Cook Collection Attorneys, PLC, Telephone (415)989-4730, appearing for Plaintiff Align Technology, Inc.;
No other apperaances.

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'S Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order

Hearing is held and the motion is granted. Order is signed

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

Second And Continued Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Aug-20-2018 Continued To Aug-30-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'S Second And Continued Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order.

Continued to August 30, 2018 @ 9 a.m. The papers filed by the moving party do not specifically identify the sources of income to be attached. The information requested shall conform to that ordered in a similar proceeding in this Court (SFSC No. 548742 - Birite v. Aguilar.) The moving party shall provide supplemental briefing with this information by August 23, 2018. Any opposition shall be filed by August 28, 2018. Plaintiff's counsel is admonished that if this is information is not provided in future motions, the motions will be denied rather than continued given the repeated Court orders on this issue.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Jul-20-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ryan L. Dahm, Cook Collection Attorneys PLC, appearing for plaintiff Align Technology, Telephone 415-989-4730;
No other appearance.

Ruling: PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC. Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order. The motion is withdrawn. No proof of service filed. Plaintiff is to re-file their motion.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT.
